---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for TahitiSpeak
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: ['enhancement', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ''
---

## 🎯 Feature Summary
A brief, clear description of the feature you'd like to see implemented.

## 🤔 Problem Statement
**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## 💡 Proposed Solution
**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## 🔄 Alternative Solutions
**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 🏝️ Cultural Relevance
**How does this relate to Tahitian culture or language learning?**
- Cultural accuracy requirements: [e.g. Traditional pronunciation, Cultural context]
- Language learning impact: [e.g. Improves pronunciation, Enhances cultural understanding]
- Community benefit: [e.g. Connects learners with native speakers, Preserves cultural knowledge]

## 👥 User Impact Analysis
**Who would benefit from this feature?**
- [ ] 🎓 Language Learners (Beginner)
- [ ] 🎓 Language Learners (Intermediate)
- [ ] 🎓 Language Learners (Advanced)
- [ ] 👨‍🏫 Instructors/Teachers
- [ ] 🏝️ Cultural Contributors
- [ ] 🗣️ Native Speakers
- [ ] 👥 Community Members
- [ ] 🔧 Developers/Contributors

**Learning Experience Improvement:**
- How would this improve the learning experience?
- What specific learning outcomes would this support?
- How does this align with language acquisition best practices?

**Usage Frequency:**
- [ ] 📅 Daily - Core learning activity
- [ ] 📅 Weekly - Regular practice feature
- [ ] 📅 Monthly - Periodic assessment/review
- [ ] 📅 Occasionally - Special events/milestones

## 🛠️ Technical Considerations
**Implementation Requirements:**
- [ ] Frontend changes required
- [ ] Backend/API changes required
- [ ] Database schema changes
- [ ] Third-party integrations needed
- [ ] Mobile app changes required

**Technology Stack:**
- New technologies/libraries needed: [e.g. Speech recognition API, Audio processing]
- Performance considerations: [e.g. Real-time processing, Large file handling]
- Scalability requirements: [e.g. Concurrent users, Data storage]

**Accessibility:**
- [ ] Screen reader compatibility required
- [ ] Keyboard navigation support
- [ ] High contrast mode support
- [ ] Mobile accessibility considerations

## 💰 Business Impact
**Feature Tier:**
- [ ] 🆓 Free feature - Available to all users
- [ ] 💎 Premium feature - Subscription required
- [ ] 🎓 Educational tier - Special pricing for schools
- [ ] 🏢 Enterprise feature - Custom implementation

**Development Effort:**
- [ ] 🟢 Small - 1-2 days
- [ ] 🟡 Medium - 1-2 weeks
- [ ] 🟠 Large - 1-2 months
- [ ] 🔴 Extra Large - 3+ months

## 📊 Success Metrics
**How would we measure the success of this feature?**
- User engagement metrics: [e.g. Daily active users, Session duration]
- Learning outcomes: [e.g. Lesson completion rate, Assessment scores]
- Community impact: [e.g. User-generated content, Social interactions]

## 🎨 Mockups & Examples
**Visual References:**
If you have any mockups, wireframes, or examples from other applications, please include them here.

**Similar Features:**
- Examples from other language learning apps: [e.g. Duolingo's streak system]
- Cultural preservation platforms: [e.g. Endangered Languages Project]
- Educational tools: [e.g. Khan Academy's progress tracking]

## 🚀 Priority Level
- [ ] 🔴 Critical - Essential for core functionality
- [ ] 🟠 High - Important for user experience
- [ ] 🟡 Medium - Nice to have enhancement
- [ ] 🟢 Low - Future consideration

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have considered the cultural sensitivity of this feature
- [ ] I have thought about accessibility requirements
- [ ] I have provided clear use cases and user stories
- [ ] I have considered the technical feasibility
- [ ] I have included relevant mockups or examples
